title: cyclosorus gustavi
intro: Cyclosorus gustavi, also known as the Cyclosorus gustavi plant, is a type of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Cyclosorus gustavi include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be prepared from the leaves or roots of the plant.
